markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Refine Prophecy's content strategy and keyword targeting for ETL modernization campaign](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [ETL modernization is a core focus, encompassing cloud migration, process changes, and cost reduction](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [Content should address pain points of legacy systems while acknowledging their past utility](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [Targeting both platform leaders and line-of-business leaders as key personas](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Need to balance highly specific topics with broader, related themes to build authority and traffic](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)

## Topics

### ETL Modernization Overview

  - [Central theme: Modernizing pipelines and compute for cloud platforms (e.g., Snowflake, Databricks)](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=2985.0)
  - [Key aspects: Speed to insight, automation (not real-time processing)](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=2777.0)
  - [Subtopics: Cloud readiness, process changes, cost efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=3009.0)
  - [Shift from ETL to ELT: Extract and Load are simple, Transform is the critical step](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=3491.0)
  - [Goal: Enable flexible data usage for AI/ML and advanced analytics](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=3604.0)

### Legacy System Pain Points

  - ["Black box" nature of old systems causing governance and visibility issues](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=3300.0)
  - [Difficulty in adapting to new cloud environments and AI/ML demands](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=3480.0)
  - [Cost inefficiencies (e.g., per-user licensing models in legacy tools)](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=3723.0)
  - [Limited ability to handle unstructured data (e.g., documents, content)](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=3624.0)

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [Focus on educating about problems and solutions without overtly pushing Prophecy](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [Create content addressing specific use cases (e.g., "How to do X in Informatica")](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=3121.0)
  - [Develop hierarchical content structure: broad topics (e.g., AI readiness) down to specific pain points](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=3839.0)
  - [Balance between highly targeted, low-volume keywords and broader topics for traffic](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)

### Persona Targeting

  - [Primary focus: Platform leaders and line-of-business leaders (not individual data engineers)](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [Address decision-makers' concerns: cost savings, governance, flexibility for AI/ML](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=3729.0)
  - [Highlight the "renaissance of data" due to AI, but emphasize the need for modernization](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=3609.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team to refine keyword clusters based on Matt's feedback and additional research](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=3839.0)
  - [Prepare updated content strategy proposal for early next week](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=3796.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up working session, potentially including Prophecy's demand generation person](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=3919.0)
  - [Investigate and potentially transcribe recent webinars (e.g., Informatica case study) for content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=4004.0)
  - [Implement clearer lineage tracking for content ideation and development process](https://fathom.video/share/an8-JuZ8-8PdBhm5W43odkRzefRAQXkY?tab=summary&timestamp=4035.0)
